parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ type: "event_callback", event: { channel: $json.channel, thread_ts: $json.thread_ts, ts: $json.ts, user: $json.user, text: $json.text } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ channel: $json.channel, text: $json.text, thread_ts: $json.thread_ts, username: $json.username, icon_emoji: $json.icon_emoji }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ channel: $('Extract PR and Check CI').first().json.channel, text: ':white_check_mark: <' + ($('Extract PR and Check CI').first().json.pr_url || ('https://github.com/paperwork-labs/paperwork/pull/' + $('Extract PR and Check CI').first().json.pr_number)) + '|PR #' + $('Extract PR and Check CI').first().json.pr_number + ': ' + ($('Extract PR and Check CI').first().json.pr_title || '') + '> merged via squash.', thread_ts: $('Extract PR and Check CI').first().json.message_ts, username: 'Engineering', icon_emoji: ':mage:' }) }}
